_template.name: FluxNova: Platform
_template.description: Base FluxNova BPM platform deployment topology with engine, web apps, REST API, and process database
_template.author: CalmStudio Contributors

nodes.name: FluxNova Platform
nodes.description: Full FluxNova BPM platform deployment comprising engine, web applications, REST API, and process database

nodes.name: FluxNova BPM Engine
nodes.description: Core BPMN 2.0 / DMN 1.3 process execution engine responsible for orchestrating workflows, managing process state, and executing service tasks

audit-logging.description: All process execution events, variable changes, and task assignments are recorded in an immutable audit log

nodes.name: FluxNova REST API
nodes.description: RESTful API layer providing 200+ endpoints for process deployment, task management, variable access, and external system integration (OpenAPI documented)

nodes.name: FluxNova Cockpit
nodes.description: Process monitoring and operations dashboard providing real-time visibility into running process instances, incidents, and batch operations

nodes.name: FluxNova Admin
nodes.description: Management console for user, group, and tenant administration, authorization configuration, and system settings

nodes.name: FluxNova Tasklist
nodes.description: Task assignment and lifecycle management UI enabling human task claiming, completion, and delegation within BPMN workflows

nodes.name: Process Database
nodes.description: Relational database storing process definitions, runtime state, history, job executor data, and audit logs

relationships.description: Engine persists process state, history, and audit data to the process database

encryption-in-transit.description: Database connection uses TLS-encrypted JDBC to protect process data and credentials in transit

relationships.description: REST API delegates all requests to the embedded engine via internal Java API calls
Cockpit queries process instances, incidents, and deployments via the REST API
Admin manages users, groups, authorizations, and system configuration via the REST API
Tasklist retrieves and completes human tasks via the REST API
FluxNova platform contains the BPM engine
FluxNova platform contains the REST API
FluxNova platform contains the Cockpit monitoring app
FluxNova platform contains the Admin management app
FluxNova platform contains the Tasklist app
FluxNova platform contains the process database
